story.title: GPT-5.6 used a prompt to close a 30-year gap in convex optimization

draft:
I just learned that GPT-5.6 was used to close a 30-year gap in convex optimization. 
This breakthrough was achieved by using a prompt to guide the model. 
The implications are significant, as it demonstrates the potential for AI to accelerate mathematical discoveries. 
What other areas of math can AI help crack next? 
#AIinMath #ConvexOptimization #GPT56
